links.$description: Shared base styles for all link-like components.

color.$description: The default colour for links is our interactive colour.

text-underline-offset.$description: The underline is positioned 2.5 pixels below the text.

hover.$description: On hover the underline thickens and moves closer to the text.

color.$description: The hover colour is our interactive hover colour.

text-decoration-thickness.$description: The underline thickness grows to 3 pixels on hover.

text-underline-offset.$description: The offset shrinks accordingly, making the underline look like it is rising.

subtle.$description: For links that are already recognisable from context, e.g. in navigation menus. No underline by default; underline appears on hover.

text-decoration-line.$description: Subtle links do not show an underline by default.
An underline is shown on hover.

contrast.$description: For links on coloured backgrounds where the default blue lacks sufficient contrast.

color.$description: On coloured backgrounds, the interactive contrast colour is used.
The same colour is used on hover.
On dark backgrounds, the interactive inverse colour is used.
The same colour is used on hover.
